title: Total supplement tax offsets 2018
description: Complete the total supplement tax offsets section in your supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, TaxPack supplement, adjustment, family trust, distribution tax, paper tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement, 2018, tax offsets, supplement offset, offset, tax offset

content_blocks.text: Did you claim any tax offsets at items T3, T4, T6, T7, T8, T9, T10 and T11?

rows: Go to step 4, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .

content_blocks.text: Add up all the tax offset amounts in the right-hand column of items T3 , T4 , T6 , T7 , T8 , T9 , T10 and T11 on your tax return.
Write the amount from step 1 at Total supplement tax offsets on page 16 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement tax offsets to T on page 5 of your tax return.

items: Go to question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2018 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
Go back to question T11 Other refundable tax offsets 2018 .

content_text:
Did you claim any tax offsets at items T3, T4, T6, T7, T8, T9, T10 and T11?
No | Go to step 4, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
Yes | Go to step 1.
## Step 1
Add up all the tax offset amounts in the right-hand column of items T3 , T4 , T6 , T7 , T8 , T9 , T10 and T11 on your tax return.
## Step 2
Write the amount from step 1 at Total supplement tax offsets on page 16 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
## Step 3
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement tax offsets to T on page 5 of your tax return.
## Step 4
Go to Total tax offsets 2018 .
## Where to go next
- Go to question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2018 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
- Go back to question T11 Other refundable tax offsets 2018 .
